title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ECIL South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ECIL South Asia Partners:
ECIL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL South Asia Partners!
